'''Gchalla''' was a [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] who [[Pilot/Legends|piloted]] the ''[[Silver Claw]]''. After being captured by the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] on [[Byblos/Legends|Byblos]], she was rescued by a group of spacers she had worked with previously.<ref name="PSG" />
